text_block_list.text:
Upon passing a park on my way home 
from a movie, I notice Neo Universe 
standing there.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
…CONT… All received. 
Neo Universe is… Pleased.

I'm not quite sure what she's doing, but it's 
less than an hour until the dorm's curfew 
starts, so I call out to her.
choice_data_list: <size=38>Don't mean to interrupt, but curfew's soon.</size>

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: I only want to… Communicate a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
The Etheric Particles have… weakened 
attenuation. The voice coming from the 
Singularity can be heard clearly now.

I recognize these terms as astrophysical ones 
and conclude from the situation that she must 
be "communicating" with some space entity.
choice_data_list: I see. You really like space, don't you?
I see. You really like space, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Neo Universe is IRST… 
Do you… also Like space?

She seems to have noticed the small movie 
pamphlet I was still holding. It was about 
the space exploration movie I just watched. 
My mind half distracted by this, I said…
choice_data_list: <size=38>Setting off into outer space is so enthralling!</size>
<size=38>Setting off into outer space is so enthralling!</size>
I love the idea of cooperating with aliens.
I love the idea of cooperating with aliens.

text_block_list.text:
She seems to have noticed the small movie 
pamphlet I was still holding. It was about 
the space exploration movie I just watched. 
My mind half distracted by this, I said…
choice_data_list: <size=38>Setting off into outer space is so enthralling!</size>
<size=38>Setting off into outer space is so enthralling!</size>
I love the idea of cooperating with aliens.
I love the idea of cooperating with aliens.

text_block_list.text:
A whole other world, still unexplored 
and unknown. An endless universe 
and exciting new encounters. It's such 
an appealing concept.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: …Do you want to feel… their presence?

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: Close… your eyes.

That's exactly what had happened in 
the movie. Anything is possible as long 
as you reach out to one another, even if 
not through words.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: You could convey those feelings… right now.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: Close… your eyes.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Connect… Send a "Hello, hello" 
from the heart.

Upon speaking those words, a sound not 
unlike a bell's rung in my head.

Though my eyes were closed, an incredible 
scene unfolded in front of me.
choice_data_list: O-Outer space!? How? I was in a park…!

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
This… is the gateway to Observation. 
Neo Universe provided NAV. Do not fear.

I floated through space, unable to discern 
any words in the voice-like noises streaming 
through my head.
choice_data_list: B-But I'm uh, hearing strange voices…

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
FELT… Meaning can be conveyed… 
without words. The same is true… 
for your own thoughts.

It was a strange sensation. Even though 
I couldn't understand anything, I definitely 
felt something akin to friendship, just like 
she said.

Conversing without the boundaries 
of words… It was like being in one of 
those science fiction movies for a bit.

With the removal of her finger from my 
forehead, I returned to a normal state 
of consciousness. Before me laid not 
outer space, but the park we were in.
choice_data_list: Was that… some kind of dream…?

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: LMT… Let's go back together.

It was real close to curfew now. I headed 
back to the Academy with Neo Universe, who 
appeared rather cheerful, in a slight panic.
